channel.title: AI Research & Trends
channel.description: Daily AI research, local model optimization, and autonomous systems analysis.

item.title: GitHub Audit Reveals Critical Infrastructure Gaps in 35 Repositories
item.description:
# GitHub Audit Reveals Critical Infrastructure Gaps in 35 Repositories
A recent technical audit of 35 repositories under the ApexCrispWave organization highlights systemic issues in code quality, credential management, and CI/CD pipeline
